texts.label: text
texts.orig: I'm a B.Tech Computer Science student driven by a strong passion for machine learning, artificial intelligence, and emerging technologies that are transforming industries. My work revolves around applying ML and AI to solve real-world problems, automate complex workflows, and build intelligent systems that learn, adapt, and scale.
texts.text: I'm a B.Tech Computer Science student driven by a strong passion for machine learning, artificial intelligence, and emerging technologies that are transforming industries. My work revolves around applying ML and AI to solve real-world problems, automate complex workflows, and build intelligent systems that learn, adapt, and scale.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Technical Stack: Python, Google Gemini Pro, LangChain (or Agentic Loops), Regex, PyPDF2/Marker.
texts.text: Technical Stack: Python, Google Gemini Pro, LangChain (or Agentic Loops), Regex, PyPDF2/Marker.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Engineered an autonomous agentic workflow using Google Gemini to iteratively optimize resumes against Job Descriptions (JD), achieving a target ATS score of 95%+.
texts.text: Engineered an autonomous agentic workflow using Google Gemini to iteratively optimize resumes against Job Descriptions (JD), achieving a target ATS score of 95%+.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Supervised Machine Learning: Regression and Classification
texts.text: Supervised Machine Learning: Regression and Classification

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Mathematics-Basics to Advance for Data Science and GenAl
texts.text: Mathematics-Basics to Advance for Data Science and GenAl

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Improving average scores from 65 to 90+ across 20+ test cases.
texts.text: Improving average scores from 65 to 90+ across 20+ test cases.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Developed a multi-stage feedback loop consisting of PDFto-Markdown extraction, scoring, and an "Autocorrection" module that refines content based on specific JD keywords and semantic gaps.
texts.text: Developed a multi-stage feedback loop consisting of PDFto-Markdown extraction, scoring, and an "Autocorrection" module that refines content based on specific JD keywords and semantic gaps.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Implemented an iterative refinement logic that runs up to 5 autonomous cycles, using LLM-based reasoning to evaluate resume-JD alignment and rewrite bullet points for maximum impact.
texts.text: Implemented an iterative refinement logic that runs up to 5 autonomous cycles, using LLM-based reasoning to evaluate resume-JD alignment and rewrite bullet points for maximum impact.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Integrated a final rendering pipeline to convert optimized Markdown back into ATS-friendly PDF format, ensuring both content and structural compliance.
texts.text: Integrated a final rendering pipeline to convert optimized Markdown back into ATS-friendly PDF format, ensuring both content and structural compliance.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Technical Stack: Python, LangGraph, Google Gemini, OpenAI (GPT4), React (JSX), Flask, PyWebView.
texts.text: Technical Stack: Python, LangGraph, Google Gemini, OpenAI (GPT4), React (JSX), Flask, PyWebView.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Architected with a stateful multi-agent system using LangGraph to automate the software development lifecycle, coordinating five specialized AI agents (Requirement Analyst, Planner, UI/UX Designer, etc.).
texts.text: Architected with a stateful multi-agent system using LangGraph to automate the software development lifecycle, coordinating five specialized AI agents (Requirement Analyst, Planner, UI/UX Designer, etc.).

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Implemented a Directed Acyclic Graph (DAG) to manage complex information flow, enabling autonomous requirement engineering, gap analysis, and strategic roadmap generation.
texts.text: Implemented a Directed Acyclic Graph (DAG) to manage complex information flow, enabling autonomous requirement engineering, gap analysis, and strategic roadmap generation.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Engineered with an "Intelligent Gap Analysis" node that identifies inconsistencies in user prompts and triggers a Human-in-the-Loop feedback cycle for 100% requirement accuracy.
texts.text: Engineered with an "Intelligent Gap Analysis" node that identifies inconsistencies in user prompts and triggers a Human-in-the-Loop feedback cycle for 100% requirement accuracy.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Developed an automated UI/UX pipeline that translates high-level technical specifications into functional, responsive React (JSX) code with a live preview interface using Flask.
texts.text: Developed an automated UI/UX pipeline that translates high-level technical specifications into functional, responsive React (JSX) code with a live preview interface using Flask.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Optimized model performance by integrating a multi-LLM strategy, utilizing Gemini Flash for rapid analysis and GPT4/Nemotron for complex reasoning and code generation.
texts.text: Optimized model performance by integrating a multi-LLM strategy, utilizing Gemini Flash for rapid analysis and GPT4/Nemotron for complex reasoning and code generation.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Technical Stack: Python, Llama 3.1 (Ollama/Local), OpenAI Whisper, LangGraph, PyAudio, Text-to-Speech (TTS).
texts.text: Technical Stack: Python, Llama 3.1 (Ollama/Local), OpenAI Whisper, LangGraph, PyAudio, Text-to-Speech (TTS).

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Data Engineering & Optimization : Engineered data pipelines to process and analyze over 50 GB of unstructured data, ensuring highquality inputs for Large Language Model (LLM) fine-tuning.
texts.text: Data Engineering & Optimization : Engineered data pipelines to process and analyze over 50 GB of unstructured data, ensuring highquality inputs for Large Language Model (LLM) fine-tuning.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Collaborative Model Refinement : Partnered with cross-functional teams to iterate model training strategies, resulting in measurable improvements to the LLM's accuracy and performance.
texts.text: Collaborative Model Refinement : Partnered with cross-functional teams to iterate model training strategies, resulting in measurable improvements to the LLM's accuracy and performance.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Quality Assurance : Developed automated scripts to clean and validate training datasets, reducing noise and improving the consistency of model outputs.
texts.text: Quality Assurance : Developed automated scripts to clean and validate training datasets, reducing noise and improving the consistency of model outputs.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Developed a privacy-centric, low-latency voice assistant capable of executing complex tasks locally, utilizing OpenAI Whisper for high-accuracy speech-to-text (STT) via PyAudio.
texts.text: Developed a privacy-centric, low-latency voice assistant capable of executing complex tasks locally, utilizing OpenAI Whisper for high-accuracy speech-to-text (STT) via PyAudio.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Engineered an agentic decision-making engine using LangGraph and Llama 3.1 , enabling the assistant to maintain state across multi-turn conversations and handle tool-calling for local system tasks.
texts.text: Engineered an agentic decision-making engine using LangGraph and Llama 3.1 , enabling the assistant to maintain state across multi-turn conversations and handle tool-calling for local system tasks.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Optimized audio processing pipelines to achieve near-realtime transcription and response, managing asynchronous streams between microphone input and LLM inference.
texts.text: Optimized audio processing pipelines to achieve near-realtime transcription and response, managing asynchronous streams between microphone input and LLM inference.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Architected with a tool-integrated workflow where the agent can autonomously decide to query local files, check system status, or perform web searches based on intent classification.
texts.text: Architected with a tool-integrated workflow where the agent can autonomously decide to query local files, check system status, or perform web searches based on intent classification.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Implemented custom state-management logic to ensure context retention, allowing the assistant to handle interruptions and follow-up commands seamlessly.
texts.text: Implemented custom state-management logic to ensure context retention, allowing the assistant to handle interruptions and follow-up commands seamlessly.
